schema.title: Response Create Project Admin Projects Post
Response List Projects Admin Projects Get
Response Update Project Admin Projects  Slug  Patch

post.description: Stateless lint for the Studio editor (continuous linting on every change).

schema.title: Response Lint Definition Sops Lint Definition Post

post.description: Document → draft SOP. Creates the SOP as a draft and returns it with lint results.
Document upload (PDF / txt / md) → draft SOP. Same pipeline as /ingest.

schema.title: Response Ingest File Sops Ingest File Post

post.description:
One conversational refinement turn. Stateless: the Studio holds the working
definition and saves explicitly (PUT) when the author is happy.

schema.title: Response Build Turn Route Sops Build Turn Post
Response Delete Sop Sops  Sop Id  Delete

get.description: Latest version by default; ?version=N pins one (A/B arms use this).

schema.title: Response Get Sop Sops  Sop Id  Get
Response List Sop Versions Sops  Sop Id  Versions Get
Response Lint Sop Sops  Sop Id  Lint Post
Response Publish Sop Sops  Sop Id  Publish Post
Response Get Pool Snapshot Sessions  Session Id  Pool Get

get.description:
The permanent record of what the supervisor did for this session — unlike
the live pool (which is cleared at session end and TTL-bound), this survives.

schema.title: Response Get Fetch Audit Sessions  Session Id  Fetches Get

get.description:
The conversation mapped onto its SOP graph: the pinned definition, every
turn (with the state/action the tracker assigned), and the prompt-block
wording that was pinned for this session. Powers the Sessions journey panel.

schema.title: Response Session Journey Sessions  Session Id  Journey Get
Response End Session Sessions  Session Id  End Post
Response Plan Turn Sessions  Session Id  Plan Turn Post

post.description:
Full text-channel turn: classify+propose (one strong-model call) →
plan-turn (pool, prompts, event) → respond from the instruction payload.
The voice channel reuses everything except the respond step.

schema.title: Response Converse Sessions  Session Id  Converse Post

post.description:
Back-propagate the session outcome onto its precedent traces — this is what
makes the predictor prefer action paths that historically ended well.

schema.title: Response Record Outcome Sessions  Session Id  Outcome Post

post.description: Create the block or append a new draft version to an existing one.

schema.title: Response Save Block Prompt Blocks Post
Response List Blocks Prompt Blocks Get

post.description:
LLM-assisted rewrite (builder model). Stateless preview — nothing is
saved; the client saves the result as a new draft version explicitly.

schema.title: Response Rewrite Block Prompt Blocks Rewrite Post
Response Get Block Prompt Blocks  Name  Get
Response Delete Block Prompt Blocks  Name  Delete
Response Publish Block Prompt Blocks  Name  Publish Post
Response Realtime Token Sessions  Session Id  Realtime Token Post

post.description: Classify + plan for one voice turn; the realtime model speaks the result.

schema.title: Response Voice Turn Sessions  Session Id  Voice Turn Post
Response Delete Secret Secrets  Name  Delete

get.description: Per-SOP totals + outcome mix — the browser's header strip.

schema.title: Response Trace Summary Traces Summary Get

get.description: Distinct actions/outcomes for filter dropdowns (scoped to one SOP if given).

schema.title: Response Trace Facets Traces Facets Get
Response Get Abtest Abtests  Abtest Id  Get

get.description:
Registry + health: fetch volume, error rate and latency percentiles from
the audit trail, plus how many SOPs bind each connector.

schema.title: Response Save Connector Connectors  Name  Put
Response Delete Connector Connectors  Name  Delete

post.description:
Fire ONE live fetch through the real fetcher with a synthetic dependency.
Nothing pools, nothing audits — this is the operator's connectivity probe.

DataDependency.title: DataDependency
DataDependency.description:
An external lookup an agent_action needs at execution time.

Mutating operations MUST set idempotent=False — the prefetch scheduler refuses
to fire them speculatively.

TaskDefinition.title: TaskDefinition
TaskDefinition.description: The full SOP definition for one task.
